sections.paragraph: 2Ki 19:12, and תְּלַשָּׂר Isa 37:12, [Telassar], pr.n. of a region in Assyria or Mesopotamia, which also occurs in Targ. of Jerus. Gen 14:1, Gen 14:9, for the Hebr. אֶלָּסָר and ibid. and in Jon. Gen 10:12, for the Hebr. רֶסֶן. (In the syllable תל there seems to be תֵּל a hill, see that word.)
